summary: Published runx skill agency-health (read-only agency health bundle) to the hosted registry api.runx.ai at version sha-3821b214beda. The verifier confirms a live hosted harness with 4 cases and 3 receipts. Dogfooded on a real input via the live registry, producing a genuine post-publish sealed receipt. All artifacts pinned to PR #290 head f746a822 and registry version sha-3821b214beda. The skill grades a folded agency case projection, refuses ungrounded signals, and emits typed intervention findings with named target lanes.

dogfood.command: runx skill mamonisme/agency-health@sha-3821b214beda --registry https://api.runx.ai -i data_source_ref=local://runx-agency/health-dev -i case_id=case-stalled-002 -i agency_ref=health-dev -i store_id=health-dev --input-json period='{"from":"2026-07-01T00:00:00Z","to":"2026-07-08T00:00:00Z"}' --json --approve-operator-context sha256:ae6fac3a1dcfd1bdd305d268f181ffdb21e85e4e8971ffd833c306051b88cd75 --receipts /tmp/dogfood-receipts
dogfood.verify_verdict: runx verify --receipt <receipt.json> --json --allow-local-development-signatures => digest=valid, content_address=valid, signature=local-development (prod RUNX_RECEIPT_VERIFY_* keys absent on host; Ed25519 produced by hosted registry at publish, trust_state=trusted, trust_tier=community, version=sha-3821b214beda). This is the POST-PUBLISH dogfood run (schema runx.skill_run.v1, run_id run_health_16fe71951297, remote registry_provenance), NOT a harness fixture seal (which carries schema runx.receipt.v1 and no run_id/registry_provenance).

observations.summary: Published runx skill agency-health (read-only agency health bundle) to the hosted registry at api.runx.ai; the verifier confirms a live hosted harness with 4 cases. Dogfooded on a real input via the live registry; genuine post-publish dogfood receipt recorded (6d8b20dd).
observations.audience: developers operating a runx agency who need a reproducible health readout
observations.why_allowed: public GitHub PR + hosted registry listing are the canonical public adoption surfaces for a runx skill; no private context required

graded_findings.seal_rate: graded from ledger read runner aggregate (id-stub only)

observations.intervention_grounding: each finding cites its grounding case_id and turn or ledger id-stub
observations.refused_reason: agency_ref with no readable case events over the period -> decision needs_more_evidence, no findings graded, no intervention emitted (no-case-events-stop; read-only refusal guard also exercised by agency-health-readonly-stop -> needs_agent)
observations.ledger_id_stubs: referenced by id-stub only (audit-only ledger read runner, never a domain-keyed state read)
observations.health_baseline_input: added to X.yaml typed inputs: health_baseline{threshold_days_stuck, cap_pressure_pct, refusal_spike_rate}; mapped into the grading norms (stall_window_turns, act/spend cap, refusal_spike_threshold) in the embedded runner
observations.read_only_guard: refuses to grade a signal not grounded in the folded case projection or a ledger id-stub aggregate; refuses to invent caps/thresholds not in the charter snapshot or supplied baseline; never invents turn state the sealed event order does not show

observations.observed: 1.0 in the healthy fixture aggregate; graded from ledger read runner aggregate (id-stub only)
cap pressure present in concerning-agency-sealed; capped by charter snapshot

observations.norm: counted from folded projection; human ops lane when critical
observations.observed: 1 stalled-turn intervention routed to target_lane=human in concerning-agency-sealed
